_meta.description: Constraint → verified workaround mappings. Loaded by workaround-auto-builder skill. Future sessions hitting the same constraint look here first instead of re-identifying.

constraints.constraint: Cannot write to Sanity from claude.ai chat sandbox — no credentials in environment

workarounds.setup_required: Add SANITY_WRITE_TOKEN to GitHub repo secrets (one-time)
Add SANITY_WRITE_TOKEN to Vercel env vars (production)
Connect Sanity MCP server (https://mcp.sanity.io) in claude.ai Settings → Connectors
workarounds.notes: MCP server confirmed available; user has not yet connected

constraints.constraint: Cannot push skills to /mnt/skills/user from outside the chat sandbox

workarounds.setup_required: Run once; installs Git post-merge hook for auto-update
workarounds.notes: Tested in sandbox — successfully wrote to /mnt/skills/user from claude.ai session

constraints.constraint: Cannot install cron jobs on the production server without SSH access

workarounds.setup_required: git push to main with workflow file

constraints.constraint: Cannot read the live Sanity Studio schema from a chat session

workarounds.setup_required: User runs the script in their repo
workarounds.notes: Script classifies every claim about external state as CONFIRMED/REFUTED/PARTIAL/UNVERIFIABLE

constraints.constraint: Cannot read Vercel project environment variables from a chat session

workarounds.artefact: Vercel MCP server (already connected in user's claude.ai)
workarounds.setup_required: User approves the tool call when prompted
workarounds.notes: MCP connected but tool call approval pending

constraints.constraint: Cannot read GitHub repo secrets from a chat session

workarounds.setup_required: User runs script after `gh auth login`
